title: scorzonera humilis var. angustifolia
intro: Scorzonera humilis var. angustifolia, also known as a variety of the lesser salsify, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce swelling, and fight infections. The health benefits of Scorzonera humilis var. angustifolia include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce blood sugar levels, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
